creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 11 14:46:26 2014
New Revision: 353705
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353705
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353705/

Log:
  - Mark DEPRECATED and set EXPIRATION_DATE to 2014-10-30
  - Update pkg-descr
  
  PR:		ports/189653
  Submitted by:	Helmut Ritter <freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/typo345/Makefile
  head/www/typo345/pkg-descr

Modified: head/www/typo345/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/typo345/Makefile	Sun May 11 14:45:58 2014	(r353704)
+++ head/www/typo345/Makefile	Sun May 11 14:46:26 2014	(r353705)
@@ -12,6 +12,9 @@ COMMENT=	The typo3 content management sy
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
+DEPRECATED=	Upgrade to www/typo3 or www/typo3-lts
+EXPIRATION_DATE=	2015-03-31
+
 PORTSCOUT=	limit:^4\.5\.
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes

Modified: head/www/typo345/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/typo345/pkg-descr	Sun May 11 14:45:58 2014	(r353704)
+++ head/www/typo345/pkg-descr	Sun May 11 14:46:26 2014	(r353705)
@@ -5,6 +5,6 @@ featuring an accomplished set of ready-m
 The stable LTS release (for old projects)
 This version is the Long Term Support release. It can be used for existing
 projects, and will get full support (bug fixes and security fixes) until April
-2014. Important and security related fixes will be provided until October 2014.
+2014. Important and security related fixes will be provided until March 2015.
 
 WWW: http://typo3.org/
